label: Auto Discovery
info: This flow scans a subnet for SNMP devices and automatically registers them into the database.

label: IMS Alerting Pipeline
info: Alertmanager webhook → LINE Messaging API / MS Teams

name: Fork 5 Walker Threads
Walk CPU
Walk Storage
Walk Network (Dual-Engine)
Walk Temperature
Bypass Empty
func:
msg.payload = [];
return msg;

name: Walk LDI (All 8 OIDs)
Load Device Registry
Resolve Device
Bulletproof AIOps Parser v8
Split Target Devices
Map K6 to V2 Format
Format Error Alert (Line/Telegram)
Generate 254 IPs
SNMP Probe (sysName)
Register to Database
Generate 254 IPs
SNMP Probe (sysName)
Register to Database
Format Alert Text
Format LINE Messaging API
Format Teams Webhook
